rulings.Case Title: JOHN MCINERNEY III VS. WESLEY STERMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, January 11, 2011, line 5. PLAINTIFF JOHN MCINERNEY'S Motion For Protective Order. Granted in part, denied in part. Granted as to special interrogs no. 353-356, which defendant has agreed to withdraw and form interrogs series 6, 7, and 15. Denied as to Special interrogs 357-359 and form interrogs series 13. As to the request for production of document, plaintiff only has to respond once - either by responding to the Request for prod. of documents set one prior to plaintiff's deposition or by bringing the requested documents to his deposition. As to all other requests not specifically identified in the moving papers, defendant is ordered to revise his discovery requests and remove all duplicative requests. Thereafter, the parties are to meet and confer to resolve any further issues. Request for sanction denied as to both parties. =(302/LMG)
